about.title: O nama
about.text: Mi smo ovlašteni građevinski inženjeri i statičari u Zadru, specijalizirani za projektiranje konstrukcija, izradu glavnih i izvedbenih projekata te druge građevinske i srodne usluge, s posebnim naglaskom na digitalizaciju i inovativna digitalna rješenja u građevinarstvu.
about.f1text: Licencirani građevinski inženjeri s ovlaštenjem za projektiranje i nadzor.
about.f2text: Moderna digitalna rješenja i BIM alati za precizno projektiranje i koordinaciju.
about.f3text: Projektiranje, stručni nadzor i digitalizacija pod jednim krovom.
about.f4text: Specijalizirani za tržište i propise Republike Hrvatske — Zadar i cijela zemlja.

contact.title: Kontaktirajte nas
contact.subtitle: Imate pitanja o projektiranju, glavnom projektu ili digitalnim rješenjima? Javite nam se!
contact.infoText: Odgovaramo na upite što je moguće brže. Slobodno nam se obratite za svaki upit.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Stručni članci, savjeti i insights iz svijeta građevinarstva i digitalnih rješenja

newsletter.title: Pretplatite se na naš newsletter
newsletter.subtitle: Budite u toku s najnovijim člancima i vijestima iz industrije

javnipoziv.title: Javni poziv Zadar 2026: Grad sufinancira do 85% obnove pročelja i dvorišta
javnipoziv.excerpt: Grad Zadar sufinancira do 85% troškova uređenja pročelja i dvorišta u kulturno-povijesnoj cjelini — do 30.000 EUR bespovratno. Rok prijave: 15.9.2026. Saznajte uvjete i kako vam možemo pomoći s pripremom, prijavom i nadzorom.

powerbi.title: PowerBI u građevinarstvu - koristan alat ili samo još jedna aplikacija?
powerbi.excerpt: Iskustva iskusnog inženjera: kako je PowerBI promijenio način upravljanja projektima kroz geolokaciju, povezivanje dokumentacije, AI RAG i visualizaciju podataka. Stvarni primjeri ušteđenog vremena i poboljšane efikasnosti.

digital.title: Digitalna transformacija u građevinarstvu: Budućnost je sada
digital.excerpt: Kako digitalna rješenja mijenjaju način na koji projektiramo i gradimo. Istražujemo najnovije trendove u BIM tehnologiji, AI u projektiranju i automatizaciji.

hero.title: Konstrukt Tech Inženjering d.o.o.
hero.subtitle: Licensed structural and civil engineer based in Zadar, Croatia. Structural design, expert supervision, specialized software development and consulting.

services.title: Our Services
services.lead: Engineering expertise and digital innovation — under one roof.

engineering.title: Structural Design & Supervision
engineering.lead: Licensed civil engineer in Zadar — structural design, expert supervision and project management from concept to handover.
items: Structural design for concrete and masonry buildings
Renovation and reconstruction of historic stone structures
Steel structure design and temporary scaffolding
Expert supervision of residential and commercial buildings
Project management for renovations and reconstructions

digital.title: Digital Services
digital.lead: Specialized digital solutions and smart tools for construction, project management and business process automation.
items: Custom-built web and desktop applications for the industry
M365 ecosystem — PowerApps, Power Automate, Azure Functions
Dashboards, analytics and data visualization
Digital solutions for public procurement and contracting
Project management and contract management tools

about.title: About Us
about.text: We are certified civil engineers and structural designers based in Zadar, specialized in structural design, main and detailed projects, and related construction services — with a particular focus on digitalization and innovative digital solutions in construction.
about.f1text: Certified civil engineers licensed for structural design and expert supervision.
about.f2text: Modern digital tools and BIM solutions for precise design and project coordination.
about.f3text: Structural design, supervision and digitalization — all under one roof.
about.f4text: Specialized in the Croatian market and regulations — Zadar and nationwide.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Questions about structural design, main projects or digital solutions? Get in touch!
contact.infoText: We respond to enquiries as quickly as possible. Feel free to reach out for any question.

javnipoziv.title: Zadar Public Call 2026: City Co-finances up to 85% of Facade and Courtyard Renovation
javnipoziv.excerpt: The City of Zadar co-finances up to 85% of facade and courtyard renovation costs in the cultural-historical zone — up to EUR 30,000 as a non-refundable grant. Deadline: Sept 15, 2026. Learn about the conditions and how we can help with preparation, application and supervision.

powerbi.title: PowerBI in Construction - Useful Tool or Just Another App?
powerbi.excerpt: An experienced engineer's insights: how PowerBI transformed project management through geolocation, documentation linking, AI RAG, and data visualization. Real examples of saved time and improved efficiency.

digital.title: Digital Transformation in Construction: The Future is Now
digital.excerpt: How digital solutions are changing the way we design and build. Exploring the latest trends in BIM technology, AI in design, and automation.
